aid_request.title: Help Kuya Gino Make His Home Safe
aid_request.description: Kuya Gino has sold taho seven days a week for ten years to support his partner and four children. Their house has no doors and no windows — just open frames. Funds raised will install doors, windows, and basic fixtures to make his home safe and secure for his family.
aid_request.purpose: Home repair — installation of doors, windows, and structural fixtures for a family dwelling in Manila.

beneficiary.name: Thomas Dymek — 39 Rescue Cats Shelter Project

aid_request.title: Help Build a Safe Shelter for 39 Rescue Cats
aid_request.description: A student rescuer is seeking funds to construct a dedicated, weatherproof shelter for 39 rescued cats currently living in inadequate conditions. Funds will cover materials for shelter construction, veterinary care, food, and ongoing maintenance for the rescued animals.
aid_request.purpose: Animal rescue shelter construction — structural build-out, veterinary expenses, and sustenance for 39 rescued cats.

aid_request.title: Rescue and Care for Abandoned Dogs and Cats in Bulacan
aid_request.description: In Pulilan, Bulacan, countless dogs and cats are abandoned and left without care. This rescue operation provides veterinary treatment, daily food, and shelter to rescued animals. Donations directly cover vet fees, food supplies, and basic shelter maintenance for animals in ongoing care.
aid_request.purpose: Animal rescue operations in Bulacan — veterinary care, food, and shelter costs for abandoned dogs and cats in Pulilan.
